{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.6": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The section does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, but it does flag at least one claim that may be problematic (the Harmony-on-bio-conservation claim).",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is adequate, but there are some issues with clarity and concision.",
    "RX.1": "The section flags uncertainty for a few clearly out-of-reach claims, but it could do more to mark confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stays within scope, but there is one drift (the contested Harmony-on-bio-conservation claim).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, but there is a minor regression (the lack of clear integration quality metrics for the 18 queries).",
    "RX.5": "The section does not provide sufficient provenance and traceability; it could do more to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.75,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The section does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, but it does flag at least one claim that may be problematic (the Harmony-on-bio-conservation claim).
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is adequate, but there are some issues with clarity and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The section flags uncertainty for a few clearly out-of-reach claims, but it could do more to mark confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within scope, but there is one drift (the contested Harmony-on-bio-conservation claim).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, but there is a minor regression (the lack of clear integration quality metrics for the 18 queries).
rationale.RX.5: The section does not provide sufficient provenance and traceability; it could do more to annotate non-cosmetic changes with source and reason.
